creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleh Hushchenkov from comment #4)
Since nobody stepped up to help, I had to put this on the back burner to focus on more important issues. I have access to much faster build hardware now, so fixing these won’t be nearly as painful. This will still need another exp-run since so much time has passed and other things have probably broken in the meantime.
